reviews.comment:
Le falta mantenimiento en los sanitarios, pero está agradable el área de recreo. Hay buen lugar de estacionamiento, una opción para hacer un alto en el camino.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms need maintenance, but the recreation area is pleasant. There's ample parking, making it a good option for a stop along the way.

reviews.comment:
Los mejores sandwiches de jamón crudo con manteca. Parabamos siempre de camino a capital cuando éramos chiquitos. Y volvimos ahora, no decepciona. El mejor recuerdo y sigue intacto.

(Translated by Google)
The best prosciutto and butter sandwiches. We always stopped there on our way to the city when we were kids. And we went back now, it doesn't disappoint. The best memory, and it's still perfect.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkMGJha0xBEAE

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Sólo tengo una cosa para decir de este lugar, prueben el sándwich de matambre y queso en pan de pbt con manteca y les aseguro que no se van a arrepentir, si viene todos son excelentes luego de probar cada uno considero que el de matambre es el mejor.

(Translated by Google)
I only have one thing to say about this place, try the matambre and cheese sandwich on PBT bread with butter and I assure you that you will not regret it. If you come, they are all excellent. After trying each one, I consider the matambre to be the best.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12390827448733246713/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0OTRueHlnRRAB
